nasb.text: He who believes in Him is not judged; he who does not believe has been judged already, because he has not believed in the name of the only begotten Son of God.

esv.text: Whoever believes in him is not condemned, but whoever does not believe is condemned already, because he has not believed in the name of the only Son of God.

cnv.text: 信他的，不被定罪；不信的，罪已經定了，因為他不信　神獨生子的名。

ccb.text: 信祂的人不会被定罪，不信的人已经被定罪，因为他们不信上帝独一的儿子。

csbs.text: 信他的人，不被定罪；不信的人，已经被定罪了，因为他不信神独生子的名。
